message:
fix(test): use deps.MinBeadsVersion in hermetic test to prevent version-bump breakage (gt-1r7kyx)

Replace hardcoded version "0.55.4" in TestBeadsBinaryCheck_HermeticSuccess with
deps.MinBeadsVersion so the test stays in sync when the minimum beads version is bumped.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
